3009320.name: Rectangulong
3009320.description:
Rectangulong is a game where two paddles hit a ball back and forth and is the first video game in history to do so. Anyway here's some features and stuff that are in the game I guess.
- 12 different games modes with unique "fun" mechanics like multi ball, bouncy fish, walls of explosives, and some other stuff.
- Play against a CPU or a friend on all 12 levels! Wow! Amazing!
- A full manual exploring the deep lore of Rectangulong's characters and world, as well as the complex gameplay mechanics.
- Lots of silly little guys.
- Easter eggs maybe.
